message.content:
@startuml
participant "C TicTacToe" as TicTacToe
participant "C Turn" as Turn
participant "C Player" as Player
participant "C Board" as Board
participant "C Error" as Error
participant "C Message" as Message
participant "C Square" as Square
participant "C Coordinate" as Coordinate
participant "C BoundedIntDialog" as BoundedIntDialog
participant "C ClosedInterval" as ClosedInterval
participant "C Direction" as Direction
participant "C YesNoDialog" as YesNoDialog
participant "C Console" as Console

TicTacToe ..> Turn : turn
Turn ..> Player : players
Player ..> Board : board
Board ..> Square : board
Square ..> Coordinate : coordinate
Coordinate ..> BoundedIntDialog : limits
BoundedIntDialog ..> ClosedInterval : limits
ClosedInterval ..> Coordinate : coordinate
Coordinate ..> Direction : direction
Direction ..> YesNoDialog : yes_no
YesNoDialog ..> Console : yes_no
Console ..> BoundedIntDialog : read
Console ..> ClosedInterval : read
Console ..> Direction : read
Console ..> YesNoDialog : read
